speaker: CATESBY
text: Rescue, my lord of Norfolk, rescue, rescue!

speaker: CATESBY
text: The King enacts more wonders than a man,

speaker: CATESBY
text: Daring an opposite to every danger.

speaker: CATESBY
text: His horse is slain, and all on foot he fights,

speaker: CATESBY
text: Seeking for Richmond in the throat of death.

speaker: CATESBY
text: Rescue, fair lord, or else the day is lost.

speaker: RICHARD
text: A horse, a horse, my kingdom for a horse!

speaker: CATESBY
text: Withdraw, my lord. I’ll help you to a horse.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Slave, I have set my life upon a cast,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And I will stand the hazard of the die.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I think there be six Richmonds in the field;

speaker: RICHARD
text: Five have I slain today instead of him.

speaker: RICHARD
text: A horse, a horse, my kingdom for a horse!
